heading: Technical assistance contracts
label: 1805 Technical assistance contracts

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall provide, upon request from a tribally controlled college or university which is receiving funds under , technical assistance either directly or through contract.section 1808 of this title

children.heading: Designated organization
children.label: 2 Designated organization
children.text: The Secretary shall require that a contract for technical assistance under paragraph (1) shall be awarded to an organization designated by the tribally controlled college or university to be assisted.

children.heading: Effect of section
children.label: b Effect of section
children.text: No authority to enter into contracts provided by this section shall be effective except to the extent authorized in advance by appropriations Acts.
